This charming 2 bedroom, 1.5 bathroom condo is perfect for small dogs. Enjoy amenities such as dishwasher, washer/dryer in unit, central air, and more. Rent includes water, sewage, recycling, and garbage. Don't miss out on this cozy space near parks with designated parking! Available 07/06/2026. Schedule a tour today!
